## Vertiv™ PowerIT Metered Rack PDU

Vertiv™ PowerIT Metered rack PDUs (rPDU) deliver reliable power to critical IT equipment within a rack or cabinet. Includes a local LED display to view real-time power data. Every unit is 100% tested for reliability and functionality.

### Best Suited For

- Banking, Financial and Insurance
- Broadcast and Entertainment
- Chemical/Petrochemical (excl. Oil & Gas)
- Construction and Engineering
- Data Center/Colocation/Hosting
- Education
- Government
- Healthcare
- Professional Services
- Retail and Wholesale

### Benefits

- **Reliable power distribution** to critical IT equipment.
- **Avoid accidental overloads** when deploying or moving critical server equipment with instant access to power consumption metrics on the local digital display.
- **100% tested** for reliability and functionality to ensure units function as designed.
- **UL listed** North American units in accordance with common data center and insurance provider requirements.
- **Five-year limited warranty** included.
- **Save time and money** by pre-integrating Vertiv™ PowerIT rPDUs with the VR Rack.

### Features

- **Local LED display** provides real-time power data for instant feedback when deploying or moving critical IT equipment.
- **Vertical and horizontal** rackmount form factors available.
- **Flexible configurations** with a variety of electrical and receptacle options to meet diverse requirements.
- **Simple installation** in all standard racks or cabinets with included mounting brackets.
- **Convenient configuration options** for cord lengths and chassis colors.
- **TAA compliant**.

### Metering Options

Vertiv Geist standard Metered rPDUs are available with two local meter options:

- **Power Meter:** Scrolls through Power Factor, Amps, Volts and Watts
- **Current Meter:** Shows the current draw in Amps

Vertiv Geist Upgradeable Metered rPDUs come standard with a local meter displaying current only. With the use of the Vertiv rPDU Scanner application and VLC (Visual Light Communication), users can gather comprehensive power usage from a mobile device.

### Upgrade Capability

The Metered Upgradeable rPDUs can be upgraded to have remote power monitoring in the future by replacing the IMD (Interchangeable Monitoring Device). The rPDU power can remain on during the removal and/or installation of the Interchangeable Monitoring Device.
